title: ATTICUS global bootstrap state
content: ATTICUS now has a dedicated supercell repo intended to act as the canonical cross-model long-term memory root. It mirrors selected state from amas-spec and atticus-mpo, supports session bootstrap packet generation, and is intended to carry compact context-bearing memory cells rather than detached summaries.
context_summary: Initial bootstrap memory cell for ATTICUS cross-model continuity. Captures the role of the supercell repo, current mirrored sources, and the immediate next implementation direction.
